'''Gleed Ontondon''' was a large creature of unknown origin who was a member of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] and [[Guild Council]]. At some point during [[Cradossk/Legends|Cradossk's]] tenure as Head of the Guild, Ontondon had served as Deputy Chief Executive, and contributed to the [[Bounty Hunters Guild Handbook]]'s introductory section concerning the basics of bounty hunting.

After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Cradossk, he became the spokesperson for the [[True Guild]], a splinter faction that had formed after the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan's]] death. The True Guild did not recognize Cradossk's son, [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], as the new Guild leader, which irritated Bossk greatly.

Gleed eventually became the go-between for the guild and [[Kud'ar Mub'at]], but began to embezzle a portion of the funds, leaving a small fortune for himself on the side. After the dissolution of the True Guild, Ontondon took the rest of the Guild's built-up funds and went into hiding, leaving the rest of his associates with nothing.

==Physical characteristics==
Ontondon was a fearsome-looking [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] with leathery skin and a spiked skull. He was also distinguishable by his hands, which were tipped with short claws.
